steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The text introduces a model in which tribal nations and research institutions are equal partners. The Blackfeet Nation–University of Montana collaboration — where tribal citizens co-designed the methodology and assist in data collection — must ______ this model. The blank needs a word meaning “serves as a clear example of.”

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — circumvents: “Circumvents” means avoids or gets around. The collaboration follows the model, not evades it. ✗
  • Choice B — eclipses: “Eclipses” means overshadows. The collaboration is an instance of the model, not something greater that casts it in shadow. ✗
  • Choice C — fabricates: “Fabricates” means invents or creates. The model was already established; this collaboration did not create it. ✗
  • Choice D — exemplifies: “Exemplifies” means serves as a clear example of. Tribal citizens and scientists working together in both design and execution is exactly what equal partnership looks like. ✓
D is correct.
